dropzone.aria: Drop files or click to browse

run.disabledNoMapping: Add at least one patient to the mapping.

pipeline.todoW4: Pipeline orchestrator wiring lands in W4. The collision scan is live; redact + safety-net come next.

collision.title: Pipeline blocked — name overlaps detected
collision.summary: {{count}} overlap(s) found. Resolve each before continuing.
collision.explain: The longer name {{longer}} contains your mapping key {{shorter}} but is not itself in the mapping. Pseudonymizing {{shorter}} here would corrupt the legitimate longer name.

actions.add: Add {{longer}} to mapping with new pseudonym
actions.approve: Approve partial match (treat {{shorter}} here as mapped)
